content: Checking status  Table of contents You can get basic info about the API by issuing /api . This status information may also be useful if you contact support, as it gives some basic diagnostics. Request code curl -k --user admin:admin --location https://test.cfengine.com/api/ Response code { "meta": { "page": 1, "count": 1, "total": 1, "timestamp": 1351154889 }, "data": [ { "apiName": "CFEngine Enterprise API", "apiVersion": "v1", "enterpriseVersion": "3.0.0a1.81c0d4c", "coreVersion": "3.5.0a1.f3649b2", "databaseHostname": "127.0.0.1", "databasePort": 27017, "authenticated": "internal", "license": { "expires": 1391036400, "installTime": 1329578143, "owner": "Stage Environment", "granted": 20, "licenseUsage": { "lastMeasured": 1351122120, "samples": 1905, "minObservedLevel": 7, "maxObservedLevel": 30, "meanUsage": 21.9689, "meanCumulativeUtilization": 109.8446, "usedToday": 7 } } } ] }
